name: Block
description: Until next turn, prevents damage.

name: Card Reward
description: A pack of [blue]3[/blue] random cards. You may choose [blue]1[/blue] to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

name: Channel
description: Channeling an Orb puts it into your first empty slot. If you have no empty slots, your first Orb is automatically [gold]Evoked[/gold] to make room.

name: Cook
description: [gold]Remove[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold] and gain [green]9[/green] Max HP at a [gold]Rest Site[/gold].

name: Deck
description: View all of the cards in your deck.

name: Discard Pile
description:
If your draw pile is empty, the discard pile is shuffled into the draw pile.

Click to view the cards in your discard pile.

name: Draw Pile
description:
At the start of each turn,
[blue]5[/blue] cards are drawn from here.

Click to view the cards in your draw pile (shuffled).

name: Energy
description: Energy is used to play cards from your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Evoke
description: Consume your rightmost Orb and use its Evoke effect.

name: Exhausted Cards
description: Click to view cards Exhausted this combat.

name: Fatal
description: Triggers whenever this card kills a non-minion enemy.

name: Forge
description: The first time you [gold]Forge[/gold] each combat, add [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Adds additional damage to [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold].

name: Hit Points
description: If you run out of HP, you die.

name: Linked Rewards
description: You can only select [blue]1[/blue] reward from this set.

name: Gold
description: How much Gold you have. Gold is the currency within the Spire.

name: Potion Slot
description: Use potions during combat to gain [green]bonuses[/green] or [red]hinder[/red] enemies.

name: Replay
description: Plays this card an additional time.

name: Ancient
description:
Ancients reside in these rooms.

They grant incredible bonuses, treasures, and knowledge.

name: Boss
description:
The deadliest foe in the area.

Defeating them will let you proceed to the next Act.

name: Elite
description:
Powerful foes are in these rooms.

Defeating them will reward you a [gold]Relic[/gold].

name: Enemy
description: Hostile enemies reside in these rooms.

name: Event
description: Something unusual occurs in these rooms...

name: Shop
description:
The mysterious Merchant sells his wares in these rooms.

Spend your well-earned [gold]Gold[/gold] here!

name: Rest Site
description: Stop by these rooms to [green]Heal[/green] some HP or [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card.

name: Treasure Room
description: [gold]Relics[/gold] and [gold]Gold[/gold] can be found in these coveted rooms.

name: Stun
description: Prevent the enemy from acting on its next turn.

name: Summon
description:
Summon [gold]Osty[/gold].
If already summoned, raise his Max HP for this combat.

name: Transform
description: Transformed cards become a random card of any rarity.
